About Me

I'm Abhilash Sahu, a passionate Full Stack Developer with expertise in building scalable web applications and e-commerce solutions. My journey from data entry to software engineering showcases my dedication to continuous learning and growth.

Years Experience
20+

Team Leadership

Performance Gains

My Journey

February 2022 - Present

Software Engineer (Full Stack)

Mango IT Solutions, Indore, MP (India)

Lead backend and full-stack development for diverse client projects across E-Commerce, SaaS, and AI platforms. Optimized system performance, reducing response times by 40% and lowering client infrastructure costs by 60% during peak traffic. Mentored and guided 5 junior developers in backend architecture, code reviews, and performance best practices.

September 2021 - February 2022

Trainee Web Developer

Mango IT Solutions

Transitioned to web development, focusing on backend technologies and API development.

September 2021

Data Entry Operator

Mango IT Solutions

Started professional career, gained understanding of data management and business processes.

2020 - 2021

Skill Development & SSB Preparation

Gap Period

Focused on learning cloud technologies and preparing for SSB interviews to enhance technical and leadership skills.

2016 - 2020

Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science & Engineering

Indore Institute of Science & Technology (IIST)

Completed Computer Science & Engineering degree with strong foundation in software development and algorithms.

Beyond Code

My journey in technology began with a strong foundation in computer science engineering and evolved through hands-on experience across different domains. What started as a data entry role transformed into a passion for building scalable solutions that solve real-world problems.

I believe in continuous learning and adapting to new technologies. Whether it's optimizing database queries, implementing complex e-commerce features, or mentoring junior developers, I approach every challenge with enthusiasm and a problem-solving mindset.

When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring new technologies, contributing to open-source projects, or preparing for technical interviews. My goal is to keep growing as a developer while helping teams build amazing products that make a difference.

Let's Connect

I'm always interested in hearing about new opportunities and exciting projects. Feel free to reach out if you'd like to collaborate or just have a chat!
